title: G2PLUS 2MM Jute String Twine, 50M Brown Natural Garden Twine, 2 Ply Natural Jute String for DIY Craft, Gardening Use
features: 【Sturdy Material】The craft string twine is made of high quality jute. Nice big spool with a great yarn. Whether for decoration, gifts or in the garden, this jute twine is a great helper. Excellent for all round use from tying back plants to jobs around the house.

【Beautiful Natural Look】The jute twine looks beautiful and natural, and most importantly, it is durable. you can make beautiful table decorations/table decorations yourself as a lantern for the garden or the like. The natural twine String goes great with the brown paper making a lovely natural looking parcel.

【The jute twine is very stable】A great way to tie up your tomato and cucumber plants outdoors and in the greenhouse. In fact you can use it to tie up any plant in the he garden, it's pretty strong and lasts a long while.

【String Twine for Craft】The jute cord is good for crafting and presentation knots. Gives a nice rustic look. It looks nice for decorating gifts in a rustic style, flower arranging, it's strong enough for many purposes.

【Well made and great to use】Length: 50M; Width: 2MM. Very functional and coarse cord in natural color can be used as garden cord, decorative cord, binding cord for DIY projects, handicrafts, gift wrapping and garden and decoration.
